title: koanophyllon sagasteguii
intro: Koanophyllon sagasteguii, also known as the Peruvian Angel's Trumpet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving pain, and it is also used to treat respiratory issues and digestive problems. Koanophyllon sagasteguii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to provide its medicinal benefits.
